why_this_run: New-module backlog for reference-doc-backed courses is EXHAUSTED — every module of AP CS A (1-10), AP Psych (1-16), AP Bio (1-11), AP Calc AB (1-12) already has a committed script.json; idempotence forbids regeneration. The in-scope gap was the mandatory artifact-contract requirement that each module folder contain _review_A/B/C.json. AP Calc AB M1+M3-M12 had script.json but were missing those review files (only M2 had the full cascade on disk), and AP Calc is the only such course with a CED reference doc for the anti-hallucination Reviewer C. This run back-filled the 3-reviewer cascade, mirroring the sanctioned 2026-05-20T04:12Z AP Biology M4-M9 retroactive cascade.
broadcast_constraint: All 12 AP Calc modules carry a youtube.video_id (verified). No script.json was edited. Critical findings were escalated to _review_failed/<slug>/WHY.md with the broadcast constraint and human options (errata vs re-record). No broadcast module was regenerated.

strategic_finding_for_human: The reference-doc-backed NEW-content backlog is EXHAUSTED. To generate genuinely new courses (AP Statistics, Geometry, Chemistry, US History, Government, Economics, World History, etc. — all have prisma course defs under server/prisma/courses/ but NO teaching-videos folders), a human must add CED/reference docs at references/<slug>-ced.md, because the auto-pipeline is forbidden from fetching live web content and Reviewer C (anti-hallucination) strictly requires a reference. Additionally, AP CS A (M1-M10) and AP Psychology (M1-M16) already have script.json but LACK the _review_A/B/C cascade; they cannot be rigorously audited until reference docs exist for them (references/ap-cs-a-ced.md and references/ap-psychology-ced.md).
next_slot_recommendations: Slot B (5am CT): nothing left to cascade for AP Calc (all 11 done + M2 pre-done). Best use of Slot B: (a) back-derive _outline.json for AP Calc M1 if the artifact contract demands it, OR (b) if a human has added references/ap-cs-a-ced.md, run the retroactive cascade for AP CS A M1-M10 (same pattern). Without a new reference doc, there is no further rigorous auto-work available — Slot B should produce an audit-only report rather than skip reviewers.

Human: (1) action the 2 confirmed errata (M4 -4/3, M12 105/90 min) — both are cheap YouTube-description corrections and the correct values are already spoken/written elsewhere in each video; (2) add CED reference docs for the next courses to unblock new generation.
